title: meliosma pinnata subsp. pinnata
intro: Meliosma pinnata subsp. pinnata, also known as the 'Golden Feather', is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique feathery foliage and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Meliosma pinnata subsp. pinnata have been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical application, and can also be used in capsule or tincture form as a dietary supplement.
